data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data in transit and at rest to protect user information.
data.technical_spec: Uses protocols like TLS for data during transmission.

data.title: Authentication Safeguards
data.description: Implements multi-factor authentication and login alerts.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes phone-based verification and app-based authentication steps.

data.title: Threat Detection Systems
data.description: Active monitoring solutions to detect and mitigate potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates machine learning algorithms to identify patterns.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic security reviews to strengthen defenses.
data.technical_spec: Engages third-party security firms for comprehensive assessments.

data.title: User Privacy Controls
data.description: Provides custom privacy settings ensuring users control their data exposure.
data.technical_spec: Granular sharing settings and content visibility controls.
